allOf.title: windowsUniversalAppX

identityName.description: The Identity Name of the app, parsed from the appx file when it is uploaded through the Intune MEM console. For example: 'Contoso.DemoApp'.

identityPublisherHash.description: The Identity Publisher Hash of the app, parsed from the appx file when it is uploaded through the Intune MEM console. For example: 'AB82CD0XYZ'.

identityResourceIdentifier.description: The Identity Resource Identifier of the app, parsed from the appx file when it is uploaded through the Intune MEM console. For example: 'TestResourceId'.

identityVersion.description: The Identity Version of the app, parsed from the appx file when it is uploaded through the Intune MEM console.  For example: '1.0.0.0'.

isBundle.description: Whether or not the app is a bundle. If TRUE, app is a bundle; if FALSE, app is not a bundle.

committedContainedApps.description: The collection of contained apps in the committed mobileAppContent of a windowsUniversalAppX app. This property is read-only.

allOf.description: Contains properties and inherited properties for Windows Universal AppX Line Of Business apps. Inherits from `mobileLobApp`.
